name: TriStar Gold Inc.
description: TriStar Gold Inc. is a mineral exploration and development company focused on the acquisition and advancement of precious metal properties in the Americas. The company's primary focus is its 100% owned flagship Castelo de Sonhos gold project, located in the mining-friendly Pará State of Brazil. Listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the symbol TSG and on the OTCQB as TSGZF, TriStar Gold is committed to developing high-quality gold assets with the potential to become significant producing mines, while maintaining strong environmental and social responsibility standards throughout its operations.
